description: SGLang version eras for the code-map indexer. SGLang's serving runtime lives under python/sglang/srt and the frontend DSL under python/sglang/lang. Paths are fairly stable across 0.4-0.5; the indexer resolves each area's layout for the requested tag.

eras.label: Pre zero-overhead-scheduler
eras.note: Older layout; the HTTP server lived in python/sglang/srt/server.py before the entrypoints/ split.

eras.label: Zero-overhead batch scheduler era
eras.note: Current architecture: overlap scheduler, srt/entrypoints/ (http_server.py, engine.py, openai/), srt/managers, srt/mem_cache (RadixAttention).

how_to_read: Each area in sglang-areas.jsonl lists layouts with optional since/until bounds. The first layout whose range contains the requested version wins; latest resolves to the newest layout.
